001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo;
002
003import androidx.room.Embedded;
004import androidx.room.Relation;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Egg;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
007import java.util.List;
008
009
010public class EggGroupWithEggs {
011
012  @Embedded
013  private EggGroup eggGroup;
014
015  @Relation(
016      parentColumn = "egg_group_id",
017      entityColumn = "egg_group_id"
018  )
019
020  private List<Egg> eggs;
021
022  public EggGroup getEggGroup() {
023    return eggGroup;
024  }
025
026  public void setEggGroup(EggGroup eggGroup) {
027    this.eggGroup = eggGroup;
028  }
029
030  public List<Egg> getEggs() {
031    return eggs;
032  }
033
034  public void setEggs(List<Egg> eggs) {
035    this.eggs = eggs;
036  }
037}
